creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Sep 03, 2006 at 11:01:23PM +0400, Dmitry Marakasov wrote:
> 
> >Number:         102829
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       [MAINTAINER] sysutils/qpxtool: update to 0.6

The new version (dunno about old one) is creating
/usr/X11R6/etc/settings directory during the build process.

See the following transcript:

--- cut ---
% pwd
/a/ports/sysutils/qpxtool
% ls -l `make -V WRKDIR`
total 4
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    0 Sep 13 11:27 .configure_done.qpxtool._usr_local
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    0 Sep 13 11:08 .extract_done.qpxtool._usr_local
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel    0 Sep 13 11:08 .patch_done.qpxtool._usr_local
drwxr-xr-x  8 root  wheel  512 Sep 13 11:38 qpxtool-0.6
% ls -l /usr/X11R6/etc/
total 12
drwxr-xr-x  3 root  wheel   512 Sep 13 11:09 fonts
-r--r--r--  1 root  wheel  2415 Sep 13 06:13 nasd.conf.eg
drwxr-xr-x  2 root  wheel   512 Sep 13 11:08 rc.d
